seed_instruction: Send an email to a software developer asking for a product demo.
org_constraint: Ensure the email begins with the phrase "I hope this message finds you well."
new_constraint: Start the email with an apology or an expression of regret.
instruction: Send an email to a software developer asking for a product demo. Ensure the email begins with the phrase "I hope this message finds you well." Start the email with an apology or an expression of regret.
response:
I hope this message finds you well.

I sincerely apologize for the delay in reaching out regarding our previous discussions. I know your time is valuable, and I regret any inconvenience this might have caused.

I am writing to formally request a product demo of your software solution. We have been following your development work with great interest, and we believe your platform could significantly streamline our current workflows. Could you please let me know your availability for a brief demonstration in the coming weeks?

Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon.

Best regards,

[Your Name]  
[Your Job Title]  
[Your Company Name]  
[Your Contact Information]
